ink-black.$description: Ink Black — Primary canvas for dark sections, product photography backgrounds, all body text on light surfaces, divider lines, and the dominant border color throughout the system

ivory-white.$description: Ivory White — Primary canvas for light sections, text on dark backgrounds, ghost-button fills and borders, the base surface against which all product photography is staged

charcoal-edge.$description: Charcoal Edge — Dark borders and separators for elevated surfaces and inverted UI. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

graphite.$description: Graphite — Secondary border tone for subtle UI structure, divider lines between content blocks, and depth separation on otherwise flat surfaces

stone-gray.$description: Stone Gray — Muted helper text, secondary metadata, and the only step down in the type hierarchy where pure black would feel too heavy — the softest voice in the system

arial.$description: Fallback system font for micro-text and edge-case rendering — appears so rarely it functions as a safety net rather than a design choice

raad-display-custom-geometric-sans-serif.$description: The sole brand typeface used for everything from uppercase product category labels to the massive hero display 'LIQUID LOVE'. The custom face is a clean geometric sans with tall x-height and wide letterforms that hold up at extreme scale. It is used at weight 400 only — no bold, no light variations. The 0.1em positive letter-spacing is applied uniformly across all sizes, creating a slightly aired-out feel even at body text. This single-font, single-weight discipline is the most opinionated choice in the system: Raad removes the typographic hierarchy tools (weight contrast, family contrast) that most sites rely on, forcing scale and letter-spacing to do all the structural work instead.

wfont8b8bfecd7287b5071a4785a78bba57128a7.$description: wfont_8b8bfe_cd7287b5071a4785a78bba57128a74e2 — detected in extracted data but not described by AI

ivory-canvas.$description: Surface level 1: Base page background for light sections — product category cards, body content areas

ink-backdrop.$description: Surface level 2: Full-bleed dark sections — hero banner, editorial story blocks, section dividers that create visual pauses
